title: acer mono var. connivens
intro: Acer mono var. connivens, also known as the Manchurian maple or Japanese maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acer mono var. connivens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, although I couldn't find specific information on its traditional preparation methods.
